articles.title: Social Security paper checks will end in 2026 as all payments become electronic
articles.description: Social Security will stop paper checks by the end of 2026. Beneficiaries must switch to electronic payments, direct deposit, or Direct Express cards.

articles.title: Meet Narinder Singh Kapany: Indian engineer who created fibre optics, the wires behind the modern internet, yet remains unknown to many
articles.description: Meet Narinder Singh Kapany: Indian engineer who created fibre optics, the wires behind the modern internet, yet remains unknown to many

articles.title: Bengal assembly adopts paperless e-Vidhan system
articles.description: Kolkata: Bengal assembly is set to undergo a major digital transformation, with a newly signed tripartite MoU paving the way for the House to function.

articles.title: ‘Make stolen phones unusable’
articles.description: Lucknow MLA Rajeshwar Singh urges Centre to make stolen phones unusable nationwide by integrating CEIR, NCRB and FIR data and sharing with sellers.

articles.title: Touchscreen MacBook is confirmed says leakster
articles.description: Apple has been rumored to launch its first touchscreen MacBook later this year, and we now have yet another indication that it is indeed happening. A new post from a Chinese leakster Instant Digital reiterates what we’ve already seen from previous reports – an upcoming MacBook will feature a touchscreen. Now the leakster does not specify which model of MacBook they are referring to, but the previous reports we’ve seen all point to it being the MacBook Ultra. While no MacBook to date has featured a touchscreen, the latest macOS 27 Golden Gate does bring touch input for Sidecar,...

articles.title: Become an AI Wizard for 59% Off With This Professional Claude Course
articles.description: Stop guessing with AI and learn how to actually use Claude like a pro. This e-degree gives you the training you need for automation, productivity, and coding for only $20.

articles.title: RMLNLU-Amity University team gets patent for AI-based portable legal assistance device
articles.description: RMLNLU-Amity University team gets patent for AI-based portable legal assistance device

articles.title: Craig Federighi and Greg Joswiak talk Siri AI and more in new interview [Video]
articles.description: On the heels of Apple’s WWDC keynote this week, Greg Joswiak and Craig Federighi sat down with Laurie Segall on the Mostly Human podcast . During the conversation, Federighi and Joz talked in-depth about Apple’s new Siri AI and Apple Intelligence announcements, the company’s broader approach to AI, and more.

articles.title: Sebi plans unified price band across bourses
articles.description: Sebi is set to launch an innovative system to regulate stock price limits, focusing on reducing the price variations seen in less liquid stocks on different exchanges. This regulatory move seeks to establish fairness in pricing and elevate the trading experience for investors dealing with these stocks.

articles.title: India restricts high speed diesel, motor spirit sale
articles.description: India has placed restrictions on institutional and commercial buyers of fuel. These customers must now source motor spirit and high-speed diesel from their own consumer pumps. The measure is in effect for an initial period of up to 90 days. Retail outlets are also limited to selling a maximum of 200 litres of high-speed diesel per customer or vehicle daily.

articles.title: Coram AI raises $35 million in Series B funding led by Ansa Capital, Battery Ventures
articles.description: Coram plans to expand hiring across AI research, software engineering, product development, sales, and marketing as it scales globally.

articles.title: Apple again warns developers not to do what Apple did in macOS 26 Tahoe
articles.description: The menu icons in macOS 26 Tahoe were roundly criticized for being both ugly and making Macs harder to use. A software engineer pointed out that Apple warned against this very mistake in guidelines published way back in 1992, and the company is now reiterating that decades-old advice as developers get to try macOS 27 Golden Gate ...

articles.title: Skoda Kodiaq RS bookings open June 22: What buyers can expect from the brand's quickest SUV in India
articles.description: The Kodiaq RS will become Skoda's first RS-badged seven-seater SUV in India.

articles.title: Half of Indian firms plan AI-powered payroll rollout in next year: ADP
articles.description: Companies are increasingly adopting AI and automation in payroll management, though concerns over data privacy, compliance and governance continue to shape deployment strategies

articles.title: Flipkart’s AI A-team; Block deals at Lenskart, Meesho; and Anthropic backtracks after blowup | MC Tech3
articles.description: In today’s Tech3 from Moneycontrol, we look at Flipkart’s latest AI-focused leadership hiring spree as it gears up for the next phase of growth and a future IPO. We also track major investor exits at Lenskart and Meesho, where early backers are turning paper gains into cash through large block deals. Plus, Anthropic reverses course after criticism over restrictions in its new AI model, and Bengaluru-based Ethereal Machines raises $28.5 million to expand manufacturing, semiconductors and industrial AI capabilities.

articles.title: 'AI is now, quantum is next': Vaishnaw opens quantum, AI labs at MNIT Jaipur
articles.description: India is prioritizing quantum technology over AI for its next major tech advancement, with a new Advanced Quantum Computing and Quantum Communications Lab established at MNIT Jaipur. The lab will focus on Quantum Key Distribution (QKD) and post-quantum cryptography, crucial for national security.

articles.title: Astrobase gets govt support for 80-ton indigenous rocket engine
articles.description: Indian space company Astrobase has received government support through IN-SPACe's Technology Adoption Fund to develop its indigenous 80-ton LOX-methane rocket engine, a major boost for India's goal of building a USD 44 billion space economy.

articles.title: Want Your Apple Watch to Last All Day? Try My 5 Go-To Tricks to Preserve Battery
articles.description: Is your smartwatch running low on juice? Here are the best ways to keep it going longer.

articles.title: If you rely on RAID array software on Mac, it's time to check with your supplier
articles.description: It's early days yet, but if you rely on vendors' software for your RAID enclosure, you probably need to find out what their macOS 27 plans are. LaCie 12Big in its natural environment in 2017 We've had macOS 27 for all of four days at this point, and there may already be a show-stopping problem for folks that hang on to RAID enclosures. We've found several that just don't work under macOS 27. For example, I've got a Thunderbolt 3 LaCie 12Big enclosure that I've had for a while. It runs fine in Tahoe, on a Mac mini home server that I've had for years. Continue Reading on AppleInsider | Discuss on our Forums

articles.title: "This cannot continue": Xbox leaders lay out "hard truths" behind sagging brand
articles.description: Brutal self-assessment paints a picture of a Microsoft gaming division in crisis.

articles.title: Framework delays Laptop 13 Pro shipments by a month
articles.description: Framework is pushing back shipments of its new Laptop 13 Pro to address issues with its haptic touchpad and display found in the run-up to mass production.

articles.title: Maruti Suzuki exports rose 4.5 times since FY14, says R C Bhargava; credits Modi-era reforms
articles.description: Maruti Suzuki Chairman said reforms since 2014 helped boost exports, competitiveness and manufacturing growth.

articles.title: BMW F 450 GS Fresh Bookings Put On Hold; Check Details
articles.description: Fresh bookings for the BMW F 450 GS have been paused as initial allocations are sold out, with the next booking cycle expected soon.

articles.title: Vi 5G Network Expands to More Cities; Airtel and Vi Restore Mobile Network Services on Mumbai Metro Aqua Line 3
articles.description: Vi has announced a series of network expansion initiatives across India. The company has released 5G in Ludhiana, Jalandhar, and Patiala. It will also extend the 5G coverage to Amritsar by this month. Vi has also launched its 5G services in Coimbatore, Tiruppur, and Vellore. Further, Vi has restored mobile connectivity on Mumbai Metro's Aqua Line 3, spanning across th...

articles.title: Over 100 Made-In-India Jet-Powered Killer Drones Delivered To Indian Army
articles.description: The consignment includes 100 operational "Peacekeeper (Agniveg)" drones and six training systems

articles.title: OnePlus N6 India Launch Teased Along With Colour Options and Design
articles.description: OnePlus N6 will be launched in India soon, the smartphone maker revealed on Thursday. The new smartphone will arrive as the first model in the tech firm’s new OnePlus N series. A dedicated microsite for the launch of the smartphone is now live on Amazon, confirming its availability via the e-commerce platform, while also teasing its design and colour options. The ha...

articles.title: Karnataka approves initiatives worth over Rs 27 crore for startups, biotech
articles.description: Karnataka's IT/BT department has approved four initiatives totaling over Rs 27 crore to boost innovation across the state. These projects include startup acceleration in Mangaluru, industry-academia partnerships in Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities, and advanced infrastructure for medical robotics and genome editing in Bengaluru.

articles.title: Canada joins Australia in push to restrict children's access to social media. Here's why
articles.description: Canada has proposed new restrictions on social media use by children under 16, joining Australia and several European countries in tightening online safety rules.

articles.title: ‘Bengaluru Is Crazy’: Wireless DJ Run in JP Nagar Goes Viral, Sparks Buzz Online (WATCH)
articles.description: A wireless DJ run in Bengaluru went viral on social media. The event featured participants running while listening to a live DJ through wireless headphones, creating a visually striking, silent yet energetic scene. The concept was praised for innovatively blending fitness, music, and community engagement.

articles.title: DXYZ, NASA, VCX Jump Premarket: Kevin O'Leary Says Betting On SpaceX, OpenAI Or Anthropic Alone Is A ‘Mistake’
articles.description: He praised SpaceX's profitable Starlink business, called Anthropic's Claude a daily-use tool, and OpenAI "one of the most important players" in AI.

articles.title: Five Things You Need to Know About the Xiaomi FX Mini LED With Fire TV Built-in
Beat Rising Petrol Prices - 5 Best Mileage Bikes in India Giving Over 65 Kmpl
articles.description: In 2026, petrol prices surpass Rs 100 per litre in many Indian cities, prompting commuters to seek fuel-efficient motorcycles. Five petrol bikes stand out for their remarkable mileage, with the Hero Splendor+ XTEC 2.0 leading at 73 kmpl.

articles.title: Hack of the day: How to use Google Maps in Incognito mode
articles.description: Google Maps now offers an Incognito mode to enhance user privacy by preventing searches and navigation history from being saved to your Google Account. This feature is ideal for sensitive searches, surprise destinations, or simply maintaining a separate activity log. When enabled, Maps will not save your activity, update your Timeline, or personalize suggestions, offering a more private navigation experience.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu to setup special monitoring team for uninterrupted power supply across the State
articles.description: Tamil Nadu's power distribution body, TNPDCL, is forming special teams in all districts. This move aims to fix faults quickly and reduce power cuts. The state serves over 35 million consumers. Special funds are allocated for urgent repairs. Electricity Minister C T R Nirmal Kumar reviewed measures to ensure continuous power for urban and suburban residents.

articles.title: OpenAI says fake accounts from China tried to turn Americans against data centers
articles.description: OpenAI has published a report detailing how China-linked influence campaigns against data centers used ChatGPT.

articles.title: The new Tecno Pova 8 boasts an 8,000mAh battery, Alive Matrix Display on its back
articles.description: With the Pova 7, Tecno took a page out of Nothing’s book with the Delta Light Interface, a triangular strip of light with 104 LEDs. Now the company is going to the next level with the Alive Matrix Display. This is a small dot-matrix display in the third “lens” of the camera island (there’s only one actual camera on there, despite appearances). The new Tecno Pova 8 is an upgrade over the Pova 7 in some respects, but a downgrade in others. It has a larger 8,000mAh battery (up from 6,000mAh). TÜV SÜD has tested the phone and found that it lasts 2 days on a single charge. That’s not all – the...

articles.title: Why thousands of Indians are filming themselves doing housework for AI companies
articles.description: Artificial intelligence chatbots and image generators crunch reams of digital data, but building systems to navigate real-life environments is more challenging.

articles.title: IN-SPACe picks Astrobase, SatSure and TM2SPACE for first funding under Technology Adoption Fund
articles.description: The three companies are the first beneficiaries under the scheme, which was launched earlier this year. They were chosen after a multi-stage evaluation process involving experts from ISRO, the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT), the Department of Science and Technology (DST), academia, industry and IN-SPACe, the agency said in a statement on Thursday.

articles.title: Google teams up with Walmart and other retailers to enable shopping within Gemini AI chatbot
articles.description: Before the recent holiday shopping season, OpenAI launched an instant checkout feature within ChatGPT

articles.title: Bitcoin trades below $63,000 despite softer inflation concerns after US CPI data
articles.description: Bitcoin dipped below $63,000 despite in-line CPI data, trading at $62,740. Major altcoins saw mixed movements, with some gaining up to 3% while Hyperliquid fell. Analysts note Bitcoin's range-bound trading and tentative recovery, with ETF flows reflecting caution. Despite market volatility, crypto adoption continues to grow.

articles.title: Chennai Ration Card Camp On June 13: Name Addition, Address Change And Mobile Update Services Available
articles.description: Chennai residents can avail ration card services, including name addition, address changes, and mobile number updates at special Public Distribution System grievance camps across the city on June 13.

articles.title: He loaned Elon Musk $1 million in a crisis; now SpaceX could make him one of the world’s richest people
articles.description: Antonio Gracias, a close friend and early investor in Elon Musk's ventures, is poised for a massive payday as SpaceX prepares for its IPO. Gracias's firm, Valor Equity Partners, holds a significant stake in SpaceX, valued at approximately $65 billion, reflecting over two decades of unwavering support and hands-on involvement, even during the companies' most challenging periods.

articles.title: Sensex Today | Stock Market Live: GIFT Nifty hints a flat start; Lenskart, ZEE, Power Grid in focus
articles.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: Stocks like Lenskart Solutions, Vascon Engineers, Zee Entertainment Enterprises, Deccan Gold Mines, PPAP Automotive, Power Grid Corporation of India, Meesho, Sapphire Foods India, CMR Green Technologies, UHM Vacation, and Vahh Chemicals will be in focus on June 11.

articles.title: Microsoft's Xbox plans for major layoffs next month: Report
articles.description: The job cuts would mark the first major restructuring under Asha Sharma, who took charge as CEO ‌of ⁠the gaming ⁠unit in February.

articles.title: EV push to absorb over Rs 24,000 cr of automakers' capex in two years as electric car adoption accelerates: Crisil
articles.description: Indian passenger vehicle makers are expected to invest over Rs 24,000 crore in electric vehicles out of a planned Rs 60,000 crore capex across FY27 and FY28, according to CRISIL Ratings. The investment will focus on expanding EV portfolios, localising supply chains and boosting production capacity.

articles.title: ‘Failing Our Children’: Canada Introduces Bill To Ban Social Media For Under-16s, Regulate AI Chatbots
articles.description: The proposed law targets seven categories of harmful online content, including material that encourages children to self-harm, promotes violence or hatred.

articles.title: This Ancient ‘Fridge’ Needs No Electricity, Find Out How It Works
articles.description: Discover the fascinating story behind the ancient pot-in-pot refrigerator, or Zeer pot.

articles.title: Mahindra & Mahindra stares at up to 15% output loss as labour crisis hits supply chain: Report
articles.description: The timing is challenging for Mahindra as demand for its SUVs remains strong

articles.title: NCR plan proposes up to 8 new smart townships, 30-minute Delhi connectivity by superfast train
Some Honor Win 2 specs leak again, Honor Win Pad Mini could be on the way too
articles.description: We've already seen the upcoming Honor Win 2's specs leaked not once, but twice, and today the prolific leaker who goes by Digital Chat Station on Weibo is back again with details about the device. According to him, the Win 2 is powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 SoC (though it's unclear if it's the 'vanilla' option or the Pro), and has a 10,000 mAh battery with support for wireless charging. Honor Win Its flat screen has "2K" resolution and an "ultra-high" refresh rate, as well as an embedded ultrasonic fingerprint scanner. The phone also comes with a telephoto camera on its...
